name: Alto de la Camparona – circular from Sariegos via Alto de la Macarena
name_original: Alto de la Camparona – circular desde Sariegos por el Alto de la Macarena
region_intro: Mountain bike trails around Sariegos offer a diverse landscape for riders. The region is characterized by its river valleys, notably the Bernesga, and rolling hills such as the Alto de la Camparona. These features provide a mix of terrain, from riverside paths to more challenging ascents. The area's rural setting includes routes that pass through local villages and open countryside. Best mountain bike trails around Sariegos The most popular mountain bike trail is Senderos del Ferral del Bernesga – circular, a 24.0 miles (38.6 km) trail that takes 3 hours 20 minutes to complete. This moderate route explores the varied terrain of the Ferral del Bernesga area. Another top favourite among local mountain bikers is Pueblos de León y cuenca del Río Bernesga – circular desde Sariegos por el camino de los Llanos, an easy 10.9 miles (17.6 km) path. This route offers gentle gradients through villages and along the Bernesga River basin. Local mountain bikers also love the Alto de la Camparona – circular from Sariegos via Alto de la Macarena, a 17.6 miles (28.3 km) trail leading through the hills of Alto de la Camparona, often completed in about 2 hours 23 minutes. Mountain biking around Sariegos is defined by river valleys, rolling hills, and rural landscapes. The network offers options for easy, moderate, and difficult routes, catering to various skill levels. The routes in Sariegos are highly rated by the komoot community with an average score of 4.5 stars from over 280 reviews. More than 2400 mountain bikers have used komoot to explore Sariegos's varied terrain.
region_faq:
Q: How many mountain bike trails are available around Sariegos?
A: Sariegos offers a wide selection of mountain bike trails, with over 160 routes available. These routes cater to various skill levels, from easy paths along river valleys to more challenging ascents in the rolling hills.

Q: What are the difficulty levels of mountain bike trails in Sariegos?
A: The mountain bike trails around Sariegos offer a good mix of difficulties. You'll find approximately 28 easy routes, 102 moderate routes, and 31 difficult routes, ensuring options for all experience levels.

Q: Are there easy mountain bike trails suitable for beginners or families in Sariegos?
A: Yes, Sariegos has several easy mountain bike trails perfect for beginners and families. A great option is &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1035216958/pueblos-de-leon-y-cuenca-del-rio-bernesga-circular-desde-sariegos-por-el-camino-de-los-llanos" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Pueblos de León y cuenca del Río Bernesga – circular desde Sariegos por el camino de los Llanos&lt;/a&gt;, which is 10.9 miles (17.6 km) long and features gentle gradients through villages and along the Bernesga River basin.

Q: Are there challenging mountain bike trails for advanced riders in Sariegos?
A: Absolutely. For advanced riders seeking a challenge, Sariegos offers routes with significant climbs and descents. The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1035234884/alto-de-la-camparona-circular-from-sariegos-via-alto-de-la-macarena" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Alto de la Camparona – circular from Sariegos via Alto de la Macarena&lt;/a&gt; is a difficult 17.6 miles (28.3 km) trail that takes you through the hills of Alto de la Camparona, providing a demanding experience.

Q: What kind of terrain can I expect on mountain bike trails in Sariegos?
A: The terrain around Sariegos is diverse, characterized by river valleys, notably the Bernesga, and rolling hills like the Alto de la Camparona. You can expect a mix of riverside paths, open countryside, and more challenging ascents and descents through rural landscapes and local villages.

Q: Are there circular mountain bike routes in Sariegos?
A: Yes, many mountain bike routes in Sariegos are circular, allowing you to start and end at the same point. A popular example is &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1040480882/senderos-del-ferral-del-bernesga-circular" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Senderos del Ferral del Bernesga – circular&lt;/a&gt;, a 24.0 miles (38.6 km) moderate trail that explores the varied terrain of the Ferral del Bernesga area.

Q: What do other mountain bikers enjoy most about the trails in Sariegos?
A: The mountain bike trails in Sariegos are highly rated by the komoot community, with an average score of 4.5 stars from over 280 reviews. Riders often praise the varied terrain, the mix of riverside paths and rolling hills, and the opportunity to explore rural landscapes and local villages.

Q: What are some notable landmarks or attractions near the mountain bike trails in Sariegos?
A: While riding in Sariegos, you're not far from historical and cultural attractions in nearby León. You could visit the impressive &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/395182" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;León Cathedral&lt;/a&gt;, explore the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/5658871" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Roman City Walls of León&lt;/a&gt;, or see the unique architecture of the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/4590991" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Casa Botines Gaudí Museum&lt;/a&gt;.

Q: What is the typical length and duration of mountain bike trails in Sariegos?
A: Trail lengths and durations vary significantly. For instance, an easy route like &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1035216958/pueblos-de-leon-y-cuenca-del-rio-bernesga-circular-desde-sariegos-por-el-camino-de-los-llanos" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Pueblos de León y cuenca del Río Bernesga – circular desde Sariegos por el camino de los Llanos&lt;/a&gt; is about 10.9 miles (17.6 km) and takes around 1 hour 23 minutes. More challenging routes, such as &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1040480882/senderos-del-ferral-del-bernesga-circular" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Senderos del Ferral del Bernesga – circular&lt;/a&gt;, can be 24.0 miles (38.6 km) and take approximately 3 hours 20 minutes.

Q: Is there mountain biking available in Sariegos that extends into nearby towns or regions?
A: Yes, some routes near Sariegos connect to or pass through other areas, offering longer rides. For example, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/1276726" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Alto de la Camparona – Venta de la Cruz loop from San Andrés del Rabanedo&lt;/a&gt; is a substantial 33.5 miles (53.8 km) route that starts from a nearby town and explores a wider area.

Q: What is the best time of year for mountain biking in Sariegos?
A: Sariegos generally offers good mountain biking conditions for much of the year. Spring and autumn provide pleasant temperatures and vibrant scenery. While specific winter conditions can vary, the region's climate typically allows for riding outside of heavy snow periods, though some higher elevation trails might be affected.
tips: We are in the Alto de la Macarena, rolling through beautiful pine forests and enjoying a road in good condition with sublime views. Fantastic place for mountain bike lovers.
Single track between pine forests and in good condition near Alto de la Camparona, a delight for mountain bike lovers.

The Alto de la Camparona is located at 1,066 meters above sea level. It is worth going up and observing the spectacular views that open up to us from the mountains of León. A good time to take a break and enjoy the panorama before continuing with our route.
